targets.rawSql:
select CASE 
    -- 1. Check if TODAY falls between the start and end DATES
    WHEN (DATE(NOW()) BETWEEN DATE(start_date_time) AND DATE(end_date_time))
    THEN 1 
    ELSE 0 
  END AS is_active, a.* from config.performance_schema_table a

select CASE 
    -- 1. Check if TODAY falls between the start and end DATES
    WHEN (DATE(NOW()) BETWEEN DATE(start_date_time) AND DATE(end_date_time))
    THEN 1 
    ELSE 0 
  END AS is_active, a.table_name, a.start_date_time, a.end_date_time, a.created_by, a.creation_date, a.last_updated_by, a.last_update_date 
  from config.include_performance_schema a where compartment='${compartment}' and display_name='${display_name}'

select CASE 
    -- 1. Check if TODAY falls between the start and end DATES
    WHEN (DATE(NOW()) BETWEEN DATE(start_date_time) AND DATE(end_date_time))
    THEN 1 
    ELSE 0 
  END AS is_active, a.table_name, a.start_date_time, a.end_date_time, a.created_by, a.creation_date, a.last_updated_by, a.last_update_date  
  from config.exclude_performance_schema a where compartment='${compartment}' and display_name='${display_name}'

SELECT VARIABLE_VALUE / 1024 / 1024 / 1024 AS size_gb
FROM `${compartment}#${display_name}`.global_variables 
WHERE VARIABLE_NAME = 'innodb_buffer_pool_size' and logtime=(select max(logtime) from `${compartment}#${display_name}`.global_variables)

SELECT (1 - (SUM(IF(VARIABLE_NAME = 'Innodb_buffer_pool_reads', VARIABLE_VALUE, 0)) / 
SUM(IF(VARIABLE_NAME = 'Innodb_buffer_pool_read_requests', VARIABLE_VALUE, 1)))) * 100 AS hit_ratio 
FROM `${compartment}#${display_name}`.global_status 
WHERE VARIABLE_NAME IN ('Innodb_buffer_pool_read_requests', 'Innodb_buffer_pool_reads') and logtime > NOW() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR;

SELECT sum(data_mb) AS `Data Size (MB)`, sum(index_mb) AS `Index Size (MB)`, sum(data_mb) + sum(index_mb) AS "Total Size (MB)"
    FROM `${compartment}#${display_name}`.TABLES where logtime=(select max(logtime) from `${compartment}#${display_name}`.TABLES)

SELECT EVENT_NAME "Event", (CURRENT_NUMBER_OF_BYTES_USED/1024/1024/1024) AS current_mem
FROM `${compartment}#${display_name}`.memory_summary_global_by_event_name
WHERE CURRENT_NUMBER_OF_BYTES_USED > 0 and 
logtime=(select max(logtime) from `${compartment}#${display_name}`.memory_summary_global_by_event_name)
ORDER BY CURRENT_NUMBER_OF_BYTES_USED DESC
LIMIT 20;

SELECT DIGEST_TEXT, COUNT_STAR, 
       FORMAT_PICO_TIME(SUM_TIMER_WAIT) AS total_latency,
       FORMAT_PICO_TIME(AVG_TIMER_WAIT) AS avg_latency
FROM `${compartment}#${display_name}`.events_statements_summary_by_digest
WHERE logtime=(select max(logtime) from `${compartment}#${display_name}`.events_statements_summary_by_digest)
ORDER BY SUM_TIMER_WAIT DESC LIMIT 10;

SELECT *
FROM `${compartment}#${display_name}`.users
WHERE logtime=(select max(logtime) from `${compartment}#${display_name}`.users)

SELECT 
    DIGEST_TEXT,
    COUNT_STAR AS execution_count,
    FORMAT_PICO_TIME(SUM_TIMER_WAIT) AS total_latency,
    FORMAT_PICO_TIME(AVG_TIMER_WAIT) AS avg_latency,
    FORMAT_PICO_TIME(MAX_TIMER_WAIT) AS max_latency,
    SUM_ROWS_EXAMINED AS total_rows_scanned
FROM `${compartment}#${display_name}`.events_statements_summary_by_digest
WHERE logtime=(select max(logtime) from `${compartment}#${display_name}`.events_statements_summary_by_digest)
ORDER BY SUM_TIMER_WAIT DESC
LIMIT 20;

SELECT logtime, source_ip, target_ip, channel_name, lag_seconds from replica.replication_lag 
where source_ip=(select ip_address from config.target_database where display_name='${display_name}')
order by logtime desc limit 60

list.definition: select display_name from config.target_database where compartment='$compartment' and start_date_time<=now() and end_date_time>=now()
list.label: Instance Name
list.name: display_name

query.query: select display_name from config.target_database where compartment='$compartment' and start_date_time<=now() and end_date_time>=now()
